item.title: v2.1.114
item.description: What's changed - Fixed a crash in the permission dialog when an agent teams teammate requested tool permission

item.title: v2.1.113
item.description: What's changed - Changed the CLI to spawn a native Claude Code binary (via a per-platform optional dependency) instead of bundled JavaScript - Added sandbox.network.deniedDomains setting to block specific domains even when a broader allowedDomains wildcard would otherwise permit them - Fullscreen mo
